title: 專家：港人學英語欠認真

replies.msg:
專家：港人學英語欠認真

【本報訊】當局提倡學生學好兩文三語，但在本地及國際學校就讀的學生都感到在校內學習中、英文各有困難，課餘需要惡補。

出版學習英語刊物的馬學禮批評，港人英文水平下降，學習態度又不及韓國等地的人認真，學校更沒有善用外籍英語老師，語文考試的設計仍是「填鴨式」。

唔係話香港人英文好好，但韓國廢到仆街喎
又唔似日本咁用日文但科研都咁勁。。。

replies.msg:
TL, DR: DON'T use google translate as a way of learning language, at least for english

watching movie without subtitle is for practicing listening for advanced learners. better have both subtitle sets on, and compare how 2 different languages express the same idea

also, only use google translate for quick reference, better use dictionary to see if the word really "fits" what you want to express. it's too easy to pick wrong word and screw up yourself
